other_observers: Cole Wild & Nick Komar; I found the bird.
description: Moderately small hummingbird with fairly short, straight bill. Underparts pale gray, nearly totally lacking in any buffy or rufous tones except for faint buffy wash on rearmost upper flanks. Upperparts contrasting dark green. White post-occular spot but no white above eye. Lores nearly black. Aruicular dark gray. Throat and forecollar nearly white. 3 gorget feathers iridescent red. Tail lacking rufous tones, with wide white tips to tail feathers. Tail notched, with central feathers distinctly shorter and each side forming rounded profile. Wings dark, with wingtips falling well short of tail tip.Behaviors: The bird was seen feeding on agastache flowers and perching in my back yard. When feeding it didn't pump or flare its tail significantly.Call: not heardPlumage: immature
photographer: Photographer: Bill Schmoker, Bill Schmoker, Bill Schmoker, Bill Schmoker
